So it’s the 21st you’re talking about Friday. Basically we’re supportive until then. Then dump. The reason why it’s confusing is because the CBOE lists quarterly Opex as 31st

comment.body:
here i covered the collar: https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/p/intraday-post-13march
and I will again, after opex, bcs it is not in effect yet, and it is not magnetic. thats a misinterpretation circulating in the soc media.
if I'm right with the further decline, that will be a vol up spot down kind of decline.
if it will happen before or after the collar expires EOM, I don't know. Post-OpEx, we are back into day by day approach, with a net short bias.
simply bcs insiders WILL push the prices lower. 

Read what I dropped today about tech. It's crucial.
NVDA, AAPL, GOOG are underpefroming. Not a coincidence. Arabians don't buy into tech that has high chinese interest in it. 
they won't give money to Xi. I know it for fact. They bought IBIT now
Wall Street wants and likely will buy China out of them. 
So more down is coming. But without liquidity who will sell? You know...

comment.body: The quote I shared is from what you said last Thursday in that post you just shared. You said if we were below 5565 short gamma strike that we would be in a spot down/vol down environment and price would grind lower in a self inducing feedback loop. And then said if we continued to decline and the collar was ITM, that "the buyback flow induces supportive flow without an elevated spot/vol beta". So the conditions would be different if we re-entered the collar zone after OPEX? Also, doesn't AAPL have a large Chinese presence as well? And didn't you buy GOOGL and AAPL calls for this Friday or later expiration?

if it will happen before or after the collar expires EOM, I don't know. Post-OpEx, we are back into day by day approach, with a net short bias.
simply bcs insiders WILL push the prices lower.

NVDA, AAPL, GOOG are underpefroming. Not a coincidence. Arabians don't buy into tech that has high chinese interest in it. 
they won't give money to Xi. I know it for fact. They bought IBIT now
Wall Street wants and likely will buy China out of them. 
So more down is coming. But without liquidity who will sell? You know...
